title: Jamaican Pilaf Dishes
description: A flavorful and aromatic Jamaican-inspired pilaf recipe, featuring tender chicken and a hint of fermented spices.
instructions: 1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
4. Stir in the Jamaican allspice and fermented soy sauce.
5. Add the pilaf mix to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10-12 minutes.
8. Stir in the tender coconut flakes.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
